query:
SELECT ff.id, ff.code, ff.name, ff.fieldType, ff.optionsSource, ff.dependsOnField, ff.filterByField, ft.name as tabName, rt.name as requestTypeName
FROM formFields ff
LEFT JOIN formTabs ft ON ff.tabId = ft.id
LEFT JOIN requestTypes rt ON ft.requestTypeId = rt.id
WHERE ff.optionsSource IN ('countries', 'cities', 'sites', 'zones', 'areas', 'regions')
AND rt.code IN ('admin_visit', 'tep')
ORDER BY rt.name, ft.displayOrder, ff.displayOrder

FROM formFields ff
LEFT JOIN formTabs ft ON ff.tabId = ft.id
LEFT JOIN requestTypes rt ON ft.requestTypeId = rt.id
WHERE ff.optionsSource IN ('countries', 'cities', 'sites', 'zones', 'areas', 'regions')
AND rt.code IN ('admin_visit', 'tep')
ORDER BY rt.name, ft.displayOrder, ff.displayOrder
